LanguageData.VCE_FineSoupRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked fine soup into 10 cooked fine soups.
LanguageData.VCE_FineSoupRecipe.label: cook fine soup

LanguageData.VCE_JellyIntoCheese.label: insect jelly into cheese

LanguageData.VCE_LavishSoupRecipe.label: cook lavish soup
LanguageData.VCE_MilkIntoCheese.label: milk into cheese

LanguageData.VCE_SimpleSoupRecipe.label: cook simple soup
